name: smartcut-license-worker
description: Cloudflare Worker: Stripe webhook ingest + license verify + signed ZXP downloads for SmartCut

scripts.secrets: echo 'Run: wrangler secret put STRIPE_SECRET_KEY && wrangler secret put STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET && wrangler secret put DOWNLOAD_SIGNING_KEY && wrangler secret put ADMIN_TOKEN && wrangler secret put RESEND_API_KEY'
